data.title: TIXR APPOINTS WAYNE GRIERSON AS MANAGING DIRECTOR, UK AND EMEA AS COMPANY ACCELERATES INTERNATIONAL EXPANSION
data.description: Wayne Grierson, who previously served as the CEO of Motorsport Events and the COO of StubHub International, has been chosen to spearhead the expansion efforts of Tixr into new geographical territories. Tixr, a prominent global technology company focused on revolutionizing ticketing and live event commerce, announced this significant development in London on March 25, 2026. Grierson will play a crucial role in leading the cross-border expansion of Tixr in the realms of music, sports, and live entertainment industries, bringing his extensive expertise to drive growth in these sectors.

data.title: Latent-Y: The Autonomous AI Agent for Drug Design at Scale
data.description: A new AI agent called Latent-Y has been introduced by Latent Labs in London and San Francisco. This agent can independently design therapeutic antibodies from a written prompt, significantly reducing the time taken for this task from weeks to hours. By utilizing Latent-X2, Latent Labs' advanced model for designing drug-like antibodies and peptides, Latent-Y enables structural drug design without the need for specialized infrastructure. The company is providing access to Latent-Y to specific partners, offering a valuable tool for accelerating drug discovery processes.

data.title: CEO STEPS DOWN, INTERIM CEO APPOINTED AS PART OF SUCCESSION
data.description: The CEO succession process at DFDS began on November 6, 2025, aiming to introduce fresh insights to steer the company through its transition to enhanced business and financial outcomes. By the conclusion of 2025, there was a noticeable improvement in financial performance, with this positive trajectory being sustained in the initial months of 2026.

data.title: The Swedish and English version of HMS Network’s Annual Report 2025 is now available
data.description: HMS Networks has released the 2025 Annual Report in both Swedish and English languages on their website, www.hms-networks.com. Printed copies can be requested via email at reception@hms-networks.com and will be ready by mid-April. The Swedish Annual Report is also accessible in the European Single Electronic Format (ESEF) on the company's website.

data.title: Rakuten Advertising and Similarweb Power LLM Visibility and Performance Intelligence for Brands
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Rakuten Advertising, a top global affiliate marketing network, and Similarweb, a digital data and market intelligence leader, unveiled a strategic partnership in London and San Mateo, California. This collaboration aims to offer unparalleled strength in the affiliate industry by combining Rakuten Advertising’s expertise with Similarweb’s cutting-edge solutions. This partnership is set to revolutionize the industry by providing valuable insights powered by Similarweb’s market intelligence to Rakuten Advertising’s vast network. The collaboration is expected to enhance the performance of affiliate marketing strategies and greatly benefit clients worldwide.

data.title: Openreach Taps Google Cloud AI to Accelerate High-Speed Internet Access and Cut Carbon
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in London and Sunnyvale, California, Openreach, the UK's largest broadband network operator, revealed a new partnership with Google Cloud to boost its sustainability and connectivity aims. This collaboration aims to enhance the telco firm's operations by leveraging Google Cloud's technology.
